passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides 50% off admission for one family/same household per day. The pass does not cover members of the group who are not immediate family/household.
Weekends (Saturdays) and the following holidays are excluded: Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Eve, New Year's Day, and the 4th of July.
Please visit The Children's Piazza website (thechildrenspiazza.com) to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations required for entry. Pass only valid on date reserved.
The email confirmation sent to you serves as your discount pass. Please present this pass (either printed or on your mobile device) upon entry to the Children's Piazza. Library staff may print this pass for you upon request.
source_phrases: This pass provides 50% off admission for one family/same household per day. The pass does not cover members of the group who are not immediate family/household.
Weekends (Saturdays) and the following holidays are excluded: Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Eve, New Year's Day, and the 4th of July.
Please visit The Children's Piazza website (thechildrenspiazza.com) to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations required for entry. Pass only valid on date reserved.

The email confirmation sent to you serves as your discount pass. Please present this pass (either printed or on your mobile device) upon entry to the Children's Piazza. Library staff may print this pass for you upon request.

passes.title: The Childrens Piazza
passes.benefit_text:
Opened in 1992, the Griffin Museum of Photography presents exhibitions, programs and lectures that support their mission of encouraging a broader understanding and appreciation of the art of photography. Three galleries are dedicated to changing exhibitions of photography by well-known, emerging, and student photographers. (Three additional satellite galleries can be found in various locations in the Boston area.)
This pass admits 2 adults for free. Children under 12 are free.
source_phrases: Opened in 1992, the Griffin Museum of Photography presents exhibitions, programs and lectures that support their mission of encouraging a broader understanding and appreciation of the art of photography. Three galleries are dedicated to changing exhibitions of photography by well-known, emerging, and student photographers. (Three additional satellite galleries can be found in various locations in the Boston area.)
This pass admits 2 adults for free. Children under 12 are free.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
Pass allows free admission for two adults and their children and or grandchildren under age 18 to tour one of historic New England's thirty-eight sites.
Pre booking tours in encouraged using the promo code on the back of the pass.
Pass does not have to be returned to the  Library.
source_phrases: Pass allows free admission for two adults and their children and or grandchildren under age 18 to tour one of historic New England's thirty-eight sites.
Pre booking tours in encouraged using the promo code on the back of the pass.
Pass does not have to be returned to the  Library.

passes.title: Historic New England
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 4 adults for $5 each (General Admission only). The discount only works for up to 4 Adult priced tickets and any additional ticket will be normally priced (Children under 18 are always free and should be reserved as child tickets).
This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have booked the library coupon.
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to 4 adults for $5 each (General Admission only). The discount only works for up to 4 Adult priced tickets and any additional ticket will be normally priced (Children under 18 are always free and should be reserved as child tickets).
This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have booked the library coupon.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife
sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2.
source_phrases: This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife
sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
source_phrases: Each promo code use provides up to two adults and four youths (7–17) with $15 admission (general and special exhibition) per person. Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old.
This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation.
BRING THIS PASS TO THE ADMISSIONS DESK  (either printed or on  your device) at the museum to have the discount applied.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Discounted admission for up to 6 visitors. 
Library Adult $20, Library Senior/Student $17, Library Youth $15
source_phrases: Discounted admission for up to 6 visitors.
Library Adult $20, Library Senior/Student $17, Library Youth $15

passes.title: Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall Of Fame
passes.benefit_text:
- This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
- Only applies to adult and child pricing.
- This is not a ticket.
- Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
- Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
- Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
source_phrases: - This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
- Only applies to adult and child pricing.
- This is not a ticket.
- Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
- Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
- Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
- Valid only for Aquarium admission.
- This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
- Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
- Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
- Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
The reserved pass allows for 50% off admission for a family of five (adults/children); it can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. Passes will be emailed to reserving patrons, without the need to come to the library to pick up the pass! Please contact the library to reserve this pass if you do not have an email address.
Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. To purchase tickets online, visit https://www.nschildrensmuseum.org/visit/buy-tickets/, click on "Buy Tickets" and select your preferred admission. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.
source_phrases: The reserved pass allows for 50% off admission for a family of five (adults/children); it can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. Passes will be emailed to reserving patrons, without the need to come to the library to pick up the pass! Please contact the library to reserve this pass if you do not have an email address.

Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. To purchase tickets online, visit https://www.nschildrensmuseum.org/visit/buy-tickets/, click on "Buy Tickets" and select your preferred admission. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 2 people for $12 per person for general admission only.
Reservations for your ticket may be made in advance by calling the museum or by going to pem.org/tickets
Yin Yu Tang Chinese House and other special exhibits require additional admission fees.
This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation.
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 people for $12 per person for general admission only.
Reservations for your ticket may be made in advance by calling the museum or by going to pem.org/tickets
Yin Yu Tang Chinese House and other special exhibits require additional admission fees.
This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
source_phrases: This pass allows the bearer a discounted admission rate ($13.50 for adults and seniors, $11.25 for children ages 3-14) for up to six visitors. Please visit www.salemwitchmuseum.com to purchase tickets, using the code on the physical museum pass. Discount cannot be applied after, nor can a refund be administered upon visiting the museum for tickets purchased without the discount. Pass must be presented to receive tickets. If you can not provide the library pass, you will be charged full admission fee.
This is a physical pass that you must pick up from and return to the library. Please return by 9 am the day after the Museum Pass is used. The pass may be returned via the book drop.
The pass is not valid the month of October.

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This discount pass is good for  4 general admissions at half price. Reservations do not need to be made in advance.
*This pass is for general admission only and special programs the museum offers are not included in the pass ( this included  Kids' Countdown to New Year's Eve (on New Year's Eve Day), Fairy Festival (TBD), or other programs that have special pricing)*
The Wenham Museum is not open Easter, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas, Day or New Year's Day. We are not open on Mondays - except for MLK Day and President's Day. During mid May - Labor Day, we are not open on Sundays in the Summer.
For admission for this pass, simply show the confirmation email date on your phone at the front desk of the museum or bring a printed out copy.
Beginning on January 2nd, our general admission rates will be changing. Visitors with museum passes from your libraries, will still receive half-off of their admissions. If you mention admission rates in any of correspondence with your patrons, please be state our new rates starting on January 2nd.
    Adults: $15
source_phrases: This discount pass is good for  4 general admissions at half price. Reservations do not need to be made in advance.

*This pass is for general admission only and special programs the museum offers are not included in the pass ( this included  Kids' Countdown to New Year's Eve (on New Year's Eve Day), Fairy Festival (TBD), or other programs that have special pricing)*

The Wenham Museum is not open Easter, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas, Day or New Year's Day. We are not open on Mondays - except for MLK Day and President's Day. During mid May - Labor Day, we are not open on Sundays in the Summer.
For admission for this pass, simply show the confirmation email date on your phone at the front desk of the museum or bring a printed out copy.

Beginning on January 2nd, our general admission rates will be changing. Visitors with museum passes from your libraries, will still receive half-off of their admissions. If you mention admission rates in any of correspondence with your patrons, please be state our new rates starting on January 2nd.
Adults: $15
Seniors & Children: $10 (Ages 2-18)
Children Under 2: Free (this is a change from our current free age)

passes.title: Wenham Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 6 people to Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or Stone Zoo (Stoneham).
Discounted rate is $9 per adult; $6 per child.
Free admission for children under 2.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the library. No timed entry tickets necessary.
